aspenridge-supply.centralize_truth: usage declines while relationship/comms stay calm
aspenridge-supply.posthog_truth: quiet pageview/autocapture decay without errors or support pressure

meridian-fleet.centralize_truth: multi-threaded growth and facilities stakeholder activity precede ARR expansion
meridian-fleet.posthog_truth: high-intent sessions cluster around relationships, opportunities, and account plans

pinehill-transport.centralize_truth: legacy dispatch integration blocks activation until late recovery
pinehill-transport.posthog_truth: support-heavy sessions show sync failures, exceptions, and slow network timing

pinnacle-supply.centralize_truth: relationship map stays narrow until a second stakeholder appears
pinnacle-supply.posthog_truth: low-error app sessions expose repeated champion/contact views

quarrystone-logistics.centralize_truth: known red account remains unworked and eventually churns
quarrystone-logistics.posthog_truth: near-absence of meaningful app usage is the signal

trailhead-logistics.centralize_truth: steady exemplary adoption with no risk or expansion trigger
trailhead-logistics.posthog_truth: boring healthy telemetry: steady usage, few errors, no anomalous replay evidence

measurement_scope: Centralize app/domain events plus PostHog-shaped raw telemetry for the six named fleetops bible arcs. Each account includes compact checkpoint snapshots plus a bounded sampled timeline over the arc. Raw PostHog events are not treated as semantic product truth; UsageSignal rows are derived separately.

source_boundaries.derived_usage_signals: agent-facing rollups derived from raw events
source_boundaries.posthog: simulated raw PostHog events emitted from Centralize app surfaces
